---
title: "CV"
description: "Curriculum vitae and downloadable tailored versions."
toc: false
---

## Main CV

- [Academic CV (primary)](/assets/cv/ShunyuWu_CV_Academics.pdf)

## Tailored CVs

- [General Academic CV](/assets/cv/ShunyuWu_CV.pdf)
- [Industry CV (English)](/assets/cv/ShunyuWu_CV_Industry_English.pdf)
- [Industry CV (Chinese)](/assets/cv/ShunyuWu_CV_Industry.pdf)
- [Targeted CV (Chinese, Version A)](/assets/cv/ShunyuWu_CV_AI.pdf)
- [Targeted CV (Chinese, Version B)](/assets/cv/ShunyuWu_CV_AI_Internet.pdf)

## Quick Profile

- Name: Shunyu Wu
- Position: Ph.D. Candidate (expected graduation: Mar 2026)
- Program: Control Science and Engineering, Shanghai Jiao Tong University
- Email: [shunyuwu@sjtu.edu.cn](mailto:shunyuwu@sjtu.edu.cn)
